base_size.note: Varies by effect type - particles are 2-4px, speech bubble is 12x10px

shared_attributes.layer: foreground (on top of all other elements)

context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet game where player cares for Echo the cockatiel
context.role: Sleep indicator that appears when Echo is in sleeping state
context.screen_position: Spawns to right of Echo at x=80-90px, y=40-50px, drifts upward and right
context.usage_scenario: Continuously spawns ZZZ particles (one every 2-3 seconds) while Echo is sleeping. Each ZZZ drifts upward-right in gentle arc, fading out. Classic sleep indicator.

visual_specification.shape: Letter 'Z' in pixel font. 3x3px character with diagonal zigzag pattern.

animation.description: Frame 1: Z appears at spawn. Frame 2: Moves up 3px, right 1px. Frame 3: Moves up 3px, right 1px, begins fade (75%). Frame 4: Moves up 3px, right 1px, fades to 50%. Frame 5: Moves up 3px, right 1px, fades to 0%. Total movement: 12px up, 4px right. Duration: 1.67 seconds.

visual_specification.details: Single 'Z' character: 3x3px in #7E2553. Pixel pattern forms diagonal zigzag. Spawns at x=85px, y=45px. Drifts to x=89px, y=33px. New Z spawns every 2-3 seconds during sleep. Sometimes 2-3 Z's visible simultaneously at different positions along drift path.

relationships.shared_with: Purple color (#7E2553) unique to this effect
relationships.differences_from: Unlike hearts/notes: diagonal drift (not straight up), text character (not icon), continuous spawn (not triggered by animation frames), purple color.

explicit_negations: No multiple Z's per particle (single Z only)
